name: FIRST HAWAIIAN, INC.
summary: First Hawaiian, Inc. (ticker: FHB) is a bank holding company headquartered in Hawaii. It operates First Hawaiian Bank, providing a range of financial products and services including commercial banking, consumer banking, and wealth management services. The company serves customers across Hawaii and other markets through its network of branches and financial service offerings.
